Opening Script
Hi, is ________________ there?
Hey 	_________________________! 	__________________, 	calling 	from 	(your
companies name). How you going today?
Okay, great! Now, if you recall, you spoke to one of my assistants a few days back,
and they sent you out some information on our state-of-the-art currency-trading program.
Does that ring a bell?
Okay, great! Well, the reason for the call today is that we’re right in the middle of
closing out our latest marketing campaign, and, if you have sixty seconds, I’d like to
share an idea with you. You got a minute?
Okay, great! Just a couple of quick questions, so I don’t waste your time:
1) 	Now, have you ever traded the currency markets before?
2) 	And are you currently invested in any other markets right now? Any stocks,
bonds, mutual funds?
3) 	Would you consider yourself a conservative investor or are you more aggressive?
4) 	And what kind of work are you doing now? And how’s it going for you?
5) 	And just for suitability purposes, how would you say your current financial
situation? Are you doing well right now, or have things been a bit tight lately?
6) 	How much do you typically put into an investment idea when you like it?
7) 	And how much are you currently liquid for? Again, just a ballpark …
Okay, great! Well, based on everything you’ve just said to me, this program is
definitely a perfect fit for you. Now, real quick, the actual name of the program is FX
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

Calibre. And FX stands for Foreign Exchange Market, which or Forex, for short—and it’s
by far the most effective trading system to ever hit the marketplace.
Now, the system is fully automated—meaning, you can simply set it and forget it, and
it does all the trading for you, so you don’t need to have any experience with the currency
market whatsoever. You follow me so far?
Okay, great! Now, the way the system actually works is by identifying nearly
imperceptible trends in global currencies—like the Pound, the Euro, and the Dollar—and
then it uses a sophisticated computer algorithm to guide you in and out of the market—
generating massive profits, with extremely low risk.
Now, in the past, this strategy had been used strictly by large, money-center banks
and institutional trading firms. Average investors, like you, were simply boxed out of
market, because the computer software didn’t exist at an affordable price. In fact, it
would have cost millions of dollars, because of the complex algorithms and the
automated trading features.
And, meanwhile, companies like Goldman Sachs and Macquarie Bank were using
these very algorithms to make hundreds of millions a month, with extremely low risk!
You follow what I’m saying?
And even on your level, by the way—even with a very small initial investment,
the returns would still be incredible! For example, on a mere $5,000 investment, you
could average as much as $ __________ a month in profit—which is over a __________
monthly return! I mean, it’s a truly staggering program!
Now, getting started with the system is very simple. Just a question of some basic
information, to get your account set up, and then we have our customer support
department download the actual trading software directly to your home computer. Soup
to nuts, the whole thing takes less than fifteen minutes, and you can be making money in
less than one day. And believe me, _______________ if you do even half as well as the
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 4 --

rest of the people in this program, you’re going to be very, very impressed. Sound fair
enough?
If He Agrees, Then Say:
Okay, great. Now, let me just make sure I have all your correct details. Your full
name is (customers name), correct? (Capture all necessary account info: name. address,
home number, cell number, email—then say…)
Now, as far as payment for the actual system goes, we have three different pricing
options, depending on your individual needs. (Go through options., and then go into a
another soft close.)
If After You First Said, Fair Enough, He Asks What’s the Cost of the
Program?
Okay, let me take you through it step-by step; it’s very simple.
Now, we have three different pricing options, depending on your individual needs.
(Go through options., and then go into a another soft close, which is …)
And, like I said before, _______________, if you do even half as well as the rest
of the clients in this program, the only problem you’ll have is I didn’t call you six months
ago and get you started then. Sound fair enough?
If he says, “Send me information or let me think about it or whatever …”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 4 --

Absolutely! No problem at all. What I’ll do is to send you out one of our e-
brochure, along with a short video clip, so you can actually see exactly how the program
works. Then I’ll get back to you in a day or so and take you through a live demonstration,
over the Internet, where you can see the trading program in action, generating massive
returns. Sound good?
Okay, great! What’s your email address? (Then set an appointment for the online
demo)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 4 --
